{"query":"UPDATE produktionsAnlagenConfig SET intTp_ID = '1',\r\n unt_ID = '1',mst_ID = '',startDate = '2021-03-01',endDate = '2021-04-14',startWeek = '',endWeek = '',ending = '0',note = 'notiz',einheitControlSys = '1',iBdeType = '1',mstIMw = 'prd2' WHERE prd_id = '2060' AND anl_id = '74' AND anl_col = 'anl01_ID' "}
